subject: [RFC 1/2] mm: page_alloc: replace pageblock_flags bitmap with struct pageblock_data

2026-04-03.patch_summary: This patch replaces the packed pageblock_flags bitmap with a per-pageblock struct containing its own flags word, reducing cache line contention and simplifying accessor code. The change has no functional impact but increases memory overhead by 8 bytes per pageblock. The hot path in the free path now touches one cache line instead of two, improving performance.
